author: Ari Nguyen
text: Published the customer dashboard API contract in Confluence and tagged frontend for review.

author: Sam Rivera
text: Risk: Northstar Bank has not sent SAML metadata yet, so SSO validation may slip by one day.

author: Priya Shah
text: Sales approved the pilot dashboard wireframes after we added account health and renewal date columns.

author: Noah Kim
text: Blocked on production-like Stripe test credentials for billing connector validation.

author: Mina Okafor
text: Customer Success confirmed the three pilot accounts and shared success criteria for Monday kickoff.
